_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Assist integrated project teams identify, curate, and manage test data.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of CI/CD pipeline concepts for data and AI projects, including continuous integration principles, automated testing integration, artifact management, deployment automation patterns, and environment promotion strategies.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-009 (AB, cosine: 0.505), AI-T-018 (AI, cosine: 0.502).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.517). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [assist, curate, identify, integrated, manage, project] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, artifact, automated, automation, cd, ci] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.882, R=0.854). P exceeds R by 0.028 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 26 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Assist integrated project teams identify, curate, and manage test data." and "Knowledge of CI/CD pipeline concepts for data and AI projects, including continu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.508 ≈ STS 0.517 (gap 0.009). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.1%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [assist, curate, identify, integrated, manage, project]. WIDAI-only: [ai, artifact, automated, automation, cd, ci].
